brand.name: Motara Auto
brand.tagline: Oman's most transparent certified used cars

hero.eyebrow: Trusted in Muscat · Imported · Inspected · Warranted
hero.title: Buy a used car you can actually trust.
hero.subtitle: Every Motara car is imported, refurbished by our team, and certified through a 50-point inspection — with photos, repair history, and warranty included.

usp.title: Why Motara
usp.subtitle: What makes us different from generic classifieds.

items.title: 50-point inspection
items.body: Every car is documented across exterior, interior, mechanical, electrical, and a full road test.

items.title: Transparent repair history
items.body: Photos at every stage — from arrival to handover. No hidden surprises.

items.title: Warranty included
items.body: 3 to 6 months of coverage on every Motara-verified car.

items.title: WhatsApp-first
items.body: Talk to a real person within 30 seconds. No spam, no pressure.

items.title: Bilingual & local
items.body: Full Arabic and English support, with team based in Muscat.

items.title: Fair, fixed pricing
items.body: Prices include VAT. No haggling games. What you see is what you pay.

process.title: How a Motara car becomes yours
process.subtitle: Four steps. No shortcuts.

steps.title: Sourced
steps.body: Hand-picked from trusted auctions in the US, Japan, and the UAE.

steps.title: Inspected
steps.body: 50-point inspection on arrival. Damage, wear, and history documented.

steps.title: Refurbished
steps.body: Repairs done in-house with OEM parts. Every step photographed.

steps.title: Delivered
steps.body: Test drive at our Muscat showroom, then drive home with warranty.

blogTeaser.title: From the blog
blogTeaser.subtitle: Buying guides, import explainers, and Oman-specific tips.

ctaBand.title: Found something you like?
ctaBand.body: Reserve it on WhatsApp in under a minute. No commitment.

carDetail.scarcity: {count} people inquired about this car this week
carDetail.warrantyCovers: Covers engine, transmission, drivetrain, and major electrical.

filters.title: Filter cars
filters.noResultsBody: Try resetting filters or browsing all cars.

compare.title: Compare up to 3 cars
compare.empty: Add cars from the listings to compare them side-by-side.
compare.max: You can compare up to 3 cars at a time.

favorites.title: Your saved cars
favorites.empty: No favorites yet. Tap the heart on any car to save it.

testDrive.title: Book a test drive
testDrive.subtitle: Pick a slot. We'll confirm on WhatsApp.
testDrive.successBody: Our team will confirm your slot on WhatsApp shortly.

contact.title: Visit us in Muscat
contact.subtitle: Or message us — we usually reply within 5 minutes.

about.title: Built on transparency
about.lead: Motara Auto is a Muscat-based dealership specialising in imported, refurbished, and certified used cars. We control every step — sourcing, repair, and delivery — so you don't have to gamble on a stranger's listing.

values.title: Honest condition grading
values.body: If a car has been repaired, we tell you. With photos.

values.title: Fair pricing
values.body: No haggling games. Prices include VAT and a real warranty.

values.title: Fast service
values.body: WhatsApp replies under 5 minutes during business hours.

services.title: What we do
services.subtitle: Three services, one promise: cars you can trust.

items.title: Vehicle import
items.body: We hand-pick cars from US, Japan, and UAE auctions and import them legally and transparently.

items.title: Refurbishment
items.body: In-house mechanics, OEM parts, photographed every step. From bodywork to detailing.

items.title: Warranty plans
items.body: 3 to 6 months of warranty included on every Motara-verified car. Extended plans available.

faqs.q: Can I inspect the car before buying?
faqs.a: Yes — every car is available for a free test drive at our Muscat showroom. No commitment.
We work with Bank Muscat and others. We can refer you and help with paperwork.

faqs.q: What if I find a problem after purchase?
faqs.a: Every Motara car comes with at least 3 months of warranty. Bring it back, we fix it.

blog.title: Guides & insights
blog.subtitle: Smarter buying for Oman's used-car market.

admin.title: Admin · Phase 2
admin.subtitle: The admin dashboard is part of the Phase 2 build. Sign in to preview.

offline.title: You're offline
offline.body: We saved the homepage and a few cars for you. Reconnect to see live inventory.

footer.tagline: Oman's most transparent certified used-car platform.

cookie.body: We use cookies for analytics and to remember your favorites and language. By using this site you agree to our cookie policy.
